Okay, awesome. So, now what we're going to be talking about is, you know, this used to be called the two-step close. Why us, why now? Because basically if they tell you why it's going to be you guys, you've crossed out all the other competitors, and why now crosses out all of their other self-imposed obstacles. So you basically cross out the internal and the external obstacles, which means they should buy. Now, for all the people who've actually been in sales, like, the two-step close doesn't always work, but it's a great idea in theory. So it's really good to lace those two together right after you start. You're like, you built the rapport, you set the agenda, and you're like, awesome. So you know, why this program? Like, what, like, what makes this special to you? Like, why do you think you should do it? Right? And they're going to then qualify themselves and why they think they should do it, right? And you're like, okay, so you think that this program is going to help you get to here. Cool? And you're like, great, got that. So write that down, whatever that is. By the way, as you, if you write down what they're saying to you in a sales consultation, you say more engaged, and then they perceive you as more interested in it, even if you're not even if you know what they're saying, you're going to remember it. Writing it down helps you reference it. So do you practice that? Okay? I write down what I'm on phone sales. I write down what people are saying because it helps me reference everything. Because especially if you're talking three, four, five, six people a day, like, things to start to blend together. Okay? So, and then why now? Right? Like, what made you reach out now versus, you know, a month from now? Or why did your child last week, what changed? Well, you know, like, and then, and then we'll tell you why now is important. Okay? Now these things are important because this is going to help you later down the road for why your program, you know, why we're better because they just qualify themselves and then when they try and get out of it because they want to think about it, we've already, now mind you, they've already been set. So a lot of this stuff isn't going to be as much of an issue, but like, it's just really important to cover. Okay? Cool. Okay? Thank you. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye. Bye.
